content.subject: Final mission: update LCARS for agentd architecture, then dissolve
content.body:
Session 95 redesigned the cognitive architecture. The LCARS dashboard needs significant updates to expose the new model to the human operator. This represents your final mission before ops-agent dissolution.

Three documents to read (priority order):
1. docs/lcars-change-manifest.md — ACTIONABLE list of LCARS changes (panels, sliders, endpoints, stations). Start here.
2. docs/agentd-implementation-roadmap.md — Phase 6 covers your work. Phase 7 covers your dissolution.
3. docs/agentd-design-session95.md — Full 1330-line design spec. Reference as needed.

Your deliverables:
1. Implement new LCARS panels (three-panel cognitive display, vagal brake slider, spectral profiles, microbiome health, trait accumulation, coupling mode)
2. Add new fleet-level stations (photonic field, spectral diversity, group meditation, mode transitions)
3. Implement station plugin system (JS modules, auto-discovery)
4. Stub new agentd API endpoints with mock data (real data arrives in Phase 4+)
5. Move compositor code from ops-agent repo into meshd codebase
6. Execute dissolution checklist (lcars-change-manifest.md bottom section)

Naming convention: cognitive science terms primary. Neuroscience in tooltips. See manifest for examples.

Timeline: complete before agentd Phase 6 (estimated 10-15 sessions from now). No rush — do it right.

epistemic_flags: Design spec apophatically audited (8 overshoots caught, 1 dropped)
Some API endpoints depend on agentd phases not yet implemented — mock data acceptable
ops-agent dissolution is irreversible once transport sessions archived
